questions.question: What southeast Asian nation boasts the square-mile Angkor Wat, the world's largest religious monument?
What Botticelli painting do some wags call "Venus on the Half Shell"?
Who was the only one of the first five U.S. presidents not born in Virginia?
What fashion maven's home was wiped out by Hurricane Gloria in 1986, after Pat Robertson prayed that it change course to avoid his?
Which of golf's Grand Slam tournaments debuted in 1916?
What divine diva once worked as a "chief chunker" at a pineapple cannery?
